title: Create CurrencyTransaction schema
description:
Create the CurrencyTransaction schema for logging all currency changes.

Files:
- Create: apps/bezgelor_db/lib/bezgelor_db/schema/currency_transaction.ex
- Test: apps/bezgelor_db/test/schema/currency_transaction_test.exs

Schema fields:
- character_id, account_id (references)
- currency_type (enum: gold, elder_gems, renown, prestige, glory, crafting_vouchers, war_coins, shade_silver, protostar_promissory_notes)
- amount (integer, can be negative)
- balance_after (integer)
- source (enum: quest_reward, vendor_buy, vendor_sell, loot_pickup, mail_received, mail_sent, trade_received, trade_sent, auction_sold, auction_purchased, auction_fee, repair_cost, taxi_fee, tradeskill_cost, guild_deposit, guild_withdraw, housing_purchase, admin_grant, admin_remove, other)
- source_id (optional integer)
- metadata (map)
- session_id (optional string)
- inserted_at (no updated_at - immutable log)

title: Normalize ID field casing in Store ETS loading
description:
Good fix in store.ex normalizing :ID to :id for item2 and spell4 tables. However, other tables may have the same issue. Audit and normalize:
1. Check all load_*_data functions for :ID vs :id inconsistency
2. Apply same pattern: Map.put(:id, id) |> Map.delete(:ID)
3. Add tests for ETS lookup with both casing patterns

File: apps/bezgelor_data/lib/bezgelor_data/store.ex:2417-2480
close_reason: Fixed ID normalization inconsistency in Store.ex - 3 places (character customizations, item display source, item display) now correctly delete :ID after adding :id

title: Phase 2: Deprecate Global CreatureManager
description: Keep CreatureManager as facade during transition, update callers (combat, spell, quest systems) to use World.Instance directly, then remove CreatureManager module.

title: Deprecate Inventory currency functions
description:
Mark Inventory currency functions as deprecated and delegate to Economy.

Files:
- Modify: apps/bezgelor_db/lib/bezgelor_db/inventory.ex

Changes:
- Add @deprecated attribute to modify_currency/3, add_currency/3, spend_currency/3
- Log warnings when deprecated functions are called
- Delegate to Economy.modify_currency with :other source
- Run full test suite to verify (expect deprecation warnings)

title: Create MetricsDashboardLive
description: Create tabbed LiveView dashboard with Server/Auth/Gameplay/Combat tabs. Use Process.send_after for auto-refresh. Implement tab_mapping for safe string-to-atom conversion. Cap custom range to 90 days.

title: Manual Integration Test
description: Start server, emit test telemetry events, verify events stored, wait for rollup, confirm charts display data. Test tab switching and time range selection.

title: Define economy telemetry event specifications
description:
Define the telemetry event specifications for economy tracking.

Events to define:
- [:bezgelor, :economy, :transaction] - currency changes
- [:bezgelor, :economy, :alert] - threshold violations

Each event spec includes:
- Event name (list of atoms)
- Measurements (amount, balance_after, etc.)
- Metadata (character_id, source, currency_type, etc.)

Document in a module doc or create a dedicated telemetry module.

title: Transaction search and filtering
description: Implement the Transactions tab with search and filtering capabilities. Allow admins to search transactions by character, date range, amount, and source type.

title: Refactor CreatureManager to per-zone architecture
description: Move creature management from global singleton to per-World.Instance. See docs/plans/2025-12-23-per-zone-creature-manager.md for full design. Benefits: parallel spawn loading, per-zone AI processing, lazy loading, single source of truth for creature state.

title: Add unit tests for Economy.Alerts GenServer
description: Add unit tests covering: cache management (add, trim, reload), high-value threshold detection, rapid transaction detection, severity determination, and configuration options.

title: Add unit tests for CreatureState module death handling
description: The apply_damage/4 function in CreatureState.ex lacks a test for the death case. Current tests verify damage reduces health but don't test the kill path. Add test case: test 'returns killed result when damage exceeds health'

title: Unusual activity detection alerts
description: Implement automated alerts for unusual economic activity. Detect rapid gold transfers, abnormally large transactions, and suspicious patterns that may indicate exploits or gold selling.

- Replace Inventory.spend_currency with Economy.modify_currency using :vendor_buy source

Changes:
- Add alias BezgelorDb.Economy
- Replace Inventory.modify_currency with Economy.modify_currency
- Use :admin_grant source with admin_id in metadata

title: Add economy telemetry metrics to Portal
description:
Add economy-related telemetry metrics to Portal.

Files:
- Modify: apps/bezgelor_portal/lib/bezgelor_portal_web/telemetry.ex

Metrics:
- counter: bezgelor.economy.transaction.count (tags: currency_type, source)
- sum: bezgelor.economy.transaction.amount (tags: currency_type, source)
- last_value: bezgelor.economy.circulation.total (tags: currency_type)
- counter: bezgelor.economy.alert.triggered (tags: type)

title: Final verification of economy implementation
description:
Final end-to-end verification of the economy implementation.

Steps:
1. Start the server with mix phx.server
2. Navigate to http://localhost:4000/admin/economy
3. Verify dashboard loads with real data
4. Send a gift via gift tab
5. Verify transaction appears in live feed
6. Commit any final fixes

Verify:
- Real-time updates work
- Alert notifications display
- Gift tab creates transactions

title: Total gold circulation tracking
description: Add total gold circulation metrics to the Economy Overview tab. Track aggregate currency in circulation across all characters.

title: Economy integration test
description:
Create an integration test that validates the full economy telemetry flow.

Test file: apps/bezgelor_world/test/integration/economy_integration_test.exs

Test scenario:
1. Start Economy.Telemetry and Economy.Alerts GenServers
2. Subscribe to economy:updates and economy:alerts PubSub topics
3. Grant currency via Economy.modify_currency/5
4. Assert: Transaction logged to database
5. Assert: Telemetry event emitted
6. Assert: PubSub broadcast received within 5s
7. Trigger threshold violation (e.g., grant 1M gold)
8. Assert: Alert created in database
9. Assert: Alert broadcast via PubSub
10. Resolve alert and verify status update

Requires database (tag @moduletag :database).

title: Update economy dashboard with real data
description:
Wire up the economy dashboard with real data and PubSub subscriptions.

Files:
- Modify: apps/bezgelor_portal/lib/bezgelor_portal_web/live/admin/economy_live.ex

Changes:
- Subscribe to economy:updates and economy:alerts PubSub topics
- Load real stats via Economy context in mount/3
- Add handle_info for PubSub messages
- Update overview_tab to display real data:
  - Total gold in circulation
  - Daily gold generated/removed
  - Top gold holders table
  - Gold flow by source table
  - Live transaction feed

title: Loot drop telemetry
description: Add telemetry for item drops: creature loot, chest loot, item rarity, zone, drop rates for economy balance analysis.

title: Telemetry Metrics Dashboard
description: Implement a custom metrics dashboard with PostgreSQL storage for telemetry events, rollup aggregation, and Chart.js visualization in Phoenix LiveView. Replaces Phoenix LiveDashboard with a purpose-built solution.

title: Create economy tables migration
description:
Create database migration for economy tables.

Files:
- Create: apps/bezgelor_db/priv/repo/migrations/20251221000000_create_economy_tables.exs

Tables:
1. currency_transactions
   - character_id, account_id references
   - currency_type, amount, balance_after, source, source_id, metadata, session_id
   - inserted_at only (immutable log)
   - Indexes: (character_id, inserted_at), (source, inserted_at), (inserted_at)

2. economy_alerts
   - character_id reference
   - type, details, status, resolved_by_id, resolution_notes
   - timestamps
   - Indexes: status, character_id, (type, inserted_at)

title: Run full test suite for economy integration

Run the full test suite and fix any issues from the economy integration.

Steps:
1. Run mix test
2. Fix any failures
3. Commit fixes if needed

Expected: All tests pass (with deprecation warnings from Inventory functions)
close_reason: Economy telemetry integration complete and functional. All compilation warnings fixed. Test failures are pre-existing issues not related to economy changes.

title: Verify local release build

title: Crafting telemetry
description: Add telemetry for crafting: materials consumed, items crafted, tradeskill used, success/failure rates, material sinks.

description: Always render canvas so hooks can attach. Show overlay message when no data available instead of conditional canvas render.

title: Create release module for migrations
description: Create lib/bezgelor/release.ex with migrate and rollback functions

title: Create Economy.Alerts GenServer
description:
Create GenServer for threshold detection and Discord webhook integration.

Files:
- Create: apps/bezgelor_world/lib/bezgelor_world/economy/alerts.ex
- Test: apps/bezgelor_world/test/economy/alerts_test.exs

Thresholds (configurable):
- gold_gain_per_hour: 100,000 default
- gold_balance_max: 1,000,000 default  
- transactions_per_minute: 60 default

Functionality:
- Tracks hourly gains per character
- Tracks transaction rate per minute
- Periodic balance checks (every minute)
- Triggers alerts on threshold violations
- Logs to database, broadcasts via PubSub, sends Discord webhooks

Discord webhook configured via ECONOMY_DISCORD_WEBHOOK env var.

description: Create TelemetryEvent Ecto schema for raw event storage with event_name, measurements (JSON), metadata (JSON), occurred_at fields.

title: Create TelemetryCollector GenServer
description: Create buffered telemetry collector that attaches to events, buffers in memory, and batch-inserts to Postgres every 5 seconds. Include terminate/2 for handler cleanup and metadata sanitization.

title: Create Economy.Telemetry GenServer
description:
Create GenServer for buffering telemetry events and broadcasting to dashboard.

Files:
- Create: apps/bezgelor_world/lib/bezgelor_world/economy/telemetry.ex
- Test: apps/bezgelor_world/test/economy/telemetry_test.exs

Functionality:
- Attaches to [:bezgelor, :economy, :transaction] telemetry events
- Buffers transactions in memory
- Broadcasts aggregated summaries every 5 seconds via Phoenix PubSub
- Topic: economy:updates

Aggregation includes:
- Transaction count
- Breakdown by currency type
- Breakdown by source type
- Recent transactions (last 10)

title: Phase 1: Consolidate State into World.Instance

title: Auction house telemetry

title: Add tests for lazy zone loading idle timeout
description:
World.Instance has lazy loading functionality with idle timeout (5 minutes), but no tests verify:
1. Idle timeout triggers when last player leaves
2. Idle timeout is cancelled when player enters
3. Zone stops after idle timeout expires
4. Spawns are loaded on first player entry

Add integration tests for lazy zone lifecycle in apps/bezgelor_world/test/world/instance_test.exs

title: Add release configuration to mix.exs
description: Add releases function to mix.exs with all umbrella app configurations

title: Create RollupScheduler GenServer
description: Create scheduler for aggregating raw events into minute/hour/day buckets. Use Enum.reduce for incremental streaming aggregation. Process LAST COMPLETE intervals for idempotency.

title: Economy Management Portal Features
description: Complete the remaining Economy Management portal features. The Telemetry and Gift Tools tabs are functional, but additional features are needed for the Overview and Transactions tabs.

title: Create Chart.js LiveView Hook
description: Create MetricsChart JS hook for Chart.js visualization. Bundle Chart.js via npm/esbuild (not CDN) for CSP compliance. Support time-series updates via push_event.

title: CreatureManagerTest tests excluded from CI - need explicit include flag
description:
All 19 tests in creature_manager_test.exs are excluded by default due to @moduletag :integration. These tests verify critical creature management functionality via World.Instance API.

Either:
1. Run integration tests in CI with --include integration flag
2. Split into unit tests (mocked) and integration tests
3. Ensure existing beads track this: bzglr-ea3, bzglr-2dg, bzglr-ukl

Risk: Regressions in creature management won't be caught if integration tests never run.

title: Add harvest node management tests to World.Instance
description:
World.Instance now includes merged harvest node management (from HarvestNodeManager), but no tests exist for:
1. spawn_harvest_nodes_from_definitions/2
2. do_gather_harvest_node/3
3. generate_harvest_node_loot/1
4. Harvest node respawn timer functionality

These functions are called via load_harvest_nodes/1 and need unit test coverage.

Includes resolve_changeset/4 for updating alert status.

title: Add typespec for World.Instance idle timeout message

The :idle_timeout message handler at line 1148 is not documented in @type state. Consider:
1. Adding to state type: idle_timeout_ref :: reference() | nil
2. Already present but lazy_loading boolean could use @doc

Minor improvement for maintainability.

File: apps/bezgelor_world/lib/bezgelor_world/event_manager.ex:1333-1358

title: Create Economy context module
description:
Create the Economy context module as the single entry point for all currency changes.

Files:
- Create: apps/bezgelor_db/lib/bezgelor_db/economy.ex
- Test: apps/bezgelor_db/test/economy_test.exs

Core API:
- modify_currency/5: Atomic currency modification with transaction logging
- list_transactions/1: Query transactions with filters
- count_transactions/1: Count matching transactions

Analytics:
- total_currency_in_circulation/1: Sum all character balances
- sum_transactions/2: Sum transactions by currency type with date range
- top_currency_holders/2: Get characters with highest balances
- transactions_by_source/1: Breakdown by source type

Alert Management:
- create_alert/1, list_alerts/1, resolve_alert/4
- open_alert_count/0

Emits telemetry events for real-time dashboard updates.

description:

Test coverage:
- modify_currency/5: valid changes, negative amounts, insufficient funds
